title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X-A.  LOUISIANA EARLY CHILDHOOD EDUCATION

§407.21.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Early Childhood Education Act".

Acts 2012, No. 3, §1, eff. April 18, 2012.
